name: DefineScope
description: Operator selects the target universe: an address list, geographic area, or subscriber list. This defines who MIGHT receive the broadcast.
inputs: Address list / geographic filter / subscriber group / mix

name: ResolveRecipients
description: For each address in scope, determine who lives or works there. Calls country-specific lookup services (CPR, CVR, NFS, KRR) to resolve phone numbers and email addresses.
outputs: Resolved recipient list (phone + email per address)

name: FilterRecipients
description: Apply ordered filter chain to each resolved recipient. Removes KRR-reserved, duplicates, address-restricted, and positive-list violations.

name: RouteByChannel
description: For each filtered recipient, determine which channel(s) to use. ProfileRoles gate which channels are available. Falls back to next available channel if preferred unavailable.

name: Deliver
description: Background service picks up Queued DeliveryRecords and sends via the appropriate carrier API. Retries on transient failure. Status updated on carrier callback.
retry_pattern: Exponential backoff, max 3 attempts, then status=PermanentlyFailed
dead_letter: PermanentlyFailed records must be preserved for audit

name: TrackAndReport
description: Aggregate delivery outcomes per broadcast: sent, delivered, failed, filtered counts. Compliance retention period controlled by Customer.MonthToDeleteMessages (default 60 months).
retention_rule: Individual delivery records deleted after MonthToDeleteMessages months
